bugs.root_cause: No early return/throw for edge case: !token

浏览器原生 EventSource 不支持自定义请求头,Authorization Bearer 没法带过去,而 /stream 路由挂了 authMiddleware,所以 SSE 一连立刻 401。本地 Android 走 mjpeg kind → SSE 帧流 → 全断,img 永远没 src。前端 usePreviewSession 用的是 EventSource(path) 不带任何 token。WebSocket 升级 handler 已经支持 ?token= query,跟 SSE 不一致。
bugs.fix: 把 ?token=<jwt> query 模式同步给 SSE:client 拼 URL 时把 token 加上;server /stream 路由在 authMiddleware 后挂 sseTokenQueryFallback(从 query.token 读,verifyToken 校验后塞 req.user),跟 WebSocket 路径一致。顺手把 usePreviewSession 的状态机改对:SSE ready 事件之前不要切 streaming,401/404 一来就显式切到 error,不再'启动中...'卡死。tsc 0 错误。

bugs.error_message: server 日志被 harmony 库 console.error('Failed to get device list:') + iOS simctl stderr 噪音淹没,功能正常(merged=1 返 200)但日志一片红
bugs.root_cause: 用户的开发机没装 hdc/idevice_id/xcrun 时,merge.ts 还是调了对应枚举路径。Harmony 这边 @midscene/harmony 库的 getConnectedDevices 在 throw 之前先 console.error 一行 + 完整 stack trace,外层 try/catch 只能接 throw 接不到 console.error。iOS 这边 xcrun/idevice 缺半套时,xcrun 自身喷 'unable to find utility simctl' 到 stderr,看着像 bug。
bugs.fix: 加 isCommandAvailable(cmd) helper(execFileAsync(cmd, ['--version']) + stdio 关 stderr + 5min TTL,ENOENT 才返 false),在 listLocalHarmonyDetailed 调底层前先 guard,缺失直接 return [];listLocalIosDetailed 同理,xcrun 和 idevice_id 都不在时直接 return [];这样既不触发库内部 console.error,也不在用户开发机产生误导性 stderr。tsc 0 错误。

bugs.error_message: 移动端用例执行完成后,mobile_case_executions.report_path DB 字段始终是 NULL,前端拿不到报告 URL
bugs.root_cause: executeMobileTest 调 agentFromAdbDevice / agentFromWebDriverAgent / agentFromHdcDevice 时不传 opts,等于不告诉 Midscene 生成报告 → agent.reportFile 永远是 null → ExecuteResult.report_path 永远是 undefined → 路由层 result.report_path || null 永远走 null 分支 → DB 写 NULL。web/pc executor 一直传 { generateReport: true, reportFileName, groupName, groupDescription },mobile 漏了。
bugs.fix: 1) mobile-executor.ts 顶部引入 generateReportPath / reportFileName / ensureReportDir / TestType;2) ExecuteOptions 加 caseId / execId 可选字段;3) executeMobileTest 顶部计算 testType='mobile' / reportName / finalReportPath;4) 加本地 copyMidsceneReport(sourcePath, targetPath)(单文件 copy,跟 pc-executor 一致;mobile 总是 in-process);5) 构造 reportAgentOpt = { generateReport: true, outputFormat: 'single-html', reportFileName, groupName, groupDescription };6) 5 个 agentFrom* 调用都传入:iOS 走 opts 唯一参数(合并 wdaHost/wdaPort),Android/Harmony 走 opts 第二参数;7) 4 个 return 点(precondition 失败、content 失败、成功、catch error)都在退出前用 agent.reportFile 调 copyMidsceneReport 把临时报告拷到 finalReportPath,失败路径也复制;8) routes/mobile-tests.ts:130 把 caseId: testCase.id 和 execId 传给 executor;9) tsc server+client 双端 0 错误。

bugs.error_message: [use-scrcpy-decoder] frame write error: Decoder not configured — 连接已有 scrcpy 共享会话时屏幕黑屏,60s 超时释放后重新连接才正常
bugs.root_cause: 新 WS 连接到已有的 shared scrcpy session 时,服务端发完 metadata 后立即推送 binary 帧(SPS/PPS config + H.264 data)。React 批处理导致 setMetadata 后尚未 re-render,decoder useEffect 未执行,此时 binary 帧到达 push() 被 stateRef.current.kind !== 'ready' 静默丢弃。SPS/PPS 配置帧丢失后,VideoDecoder 收到 data 帧但未 configure,报 Decoder not configured。60s 超时后 shared session 关闭,重新执行时全新 scrcpy 进程从头推送,时序上 metadata 先到 → decoder 先初始化 → 不丢帧,所以能正常显示。
bugs.fix: 在 push() 中,decoder 未就绪时将帧缓存到 pendingFramesRef 而非丢弃。useEffect([metadata]) 中 decoder 初始化后调用 flushPendingFrames(),按 config(0x00) 优先于 data(0x01) 排序回放,确保 SPS/PPS 在 H.264 NAL units 之前到达 VideoDecoder。cleanup 时清空 buffer。

bugs.root_cause: Code path had no error handling — exceptions would propagate uncaught

bugs.error_message: Re-entering mobile test page within 60s: scrcpy shows Decoder not configured
bugs.root_cause: Shared scrcpy session sends metadata JSON to new subscribers but not the SPS/PPS configuration frame (type 0x00). The WebCodecs VideoDecoder requires SPS/PPS before decoding any data frames. Configuration frames are only sent once at stream start, so late-joining subscribers never receive them.
bugs.fix: Cache lastConfigFrame in SharedScrcpySession, update in runReaderLoop, resend in attachSharedScrcpySubscriber

bugs.error_message: Local device shows "Xs 后释放" instead of "占用中" during execution
bugs.root_cause: enrichDeviceState hardcodes busy=false for local devices because they have no devices.id row. During execution, viewerCount>0 shows misleading "N 人观看 (60s 后释放)" instead of busy status.
bugs.fix: Add executingLocalDevices Set in mobile-tests.ts, check in merge.ts enrichDeviceState, set busy=true for executing local devices

bugs.error_message: Remote device busy status only tracked in-memory, not durable across processes/restarts
bugs.root_cause: Local device busy was tracked via in-memory Set (executingLocalDevices). Multi-process/restart loses state. Remote devices already used DB UNIQUE INDEX on device_id, but local devices wrote device_id=NULL so DB check did not cover them.
bugs.fix: Added local_device_key TEXT column to mobile_case_executions, partial UNIQUE INDEX for running+non-null. Both local and remote devices now have DB-backed busy checks. Removed in-memory Set.

bugs.error_message: PC测试执行报告中的截图和视频都是黑的,没有截到屏幕
bugs.root_cause: macOS 需要 Screen Recording + Accessibility 两个 TCC 权限才能正常截图。checkComputerEnvironment() 失败只打 warning 不阻断,导致测试继续执行但截图全是黑的
bugs.fix: 在 agentForComputer() 之前加 checkScreenRecordingPermission() + checkAccessibilityPermission() 硬失败检查,权限不足直接返回 error 状态

bugs.error_message: PC test report screenshots are black — images fail to load in HTML report
bugs.root_cause: copyMidsceneReport used fs.copyFile to copy only index.html, but html-and-external-assets format generates index.html + screenshots/ directory. The screenshots/ directory was not copied to the target path, so the report HTML relative references resolved to 404.
bugs.fix: Changed copyMidsceneReport from fs.copyFile to fs.cp(sourceDir, targetDir, { recursive: true, force: true }) to copy the entire report directory including screenshots/. Matches web-executor existing fix.

bugs.root_cause: 大量页面级 CSS 文件硬编码 `background: #fff` / `background: white` / `background: var(--surface, #ffffff)`,绕过了主题变量,var() 在 dark theme 下不会切换到 dark surface。涉及 ApiDetail(13)/PcCaseDetail(10)/WebCaseDetail(9)/MockList(7)/MockDetail(4)/App.css(1)/buttons.css(1)/MidsceneReportViewer(1)/WebBrowserConfig(1)/MobileTestDetail(1)。还有一处 buttons.css 的 rule-switch-slider::before 圆球也被误改,需保留白球。

bugs.error_message: 详情页 dark theme 下:CodeMirror 编辑器仍是亮色;CaseContentEditor tabBtnStyle 硬编码 #1677ff/#fff/#333/#d9d9d9;详情页 tsx 内 inline color #bbb/#999/#666/#fff 等深浅灰白色不跟随主题
bugs.root_cause: 1) 所有 CodeMirror 实例(8 个直接调用点分散在 5 个文件)都没传 theme extension,@uiw/react-codemirror 默认是 light 主题,dark 下显示白底刺眼。2) CaseContentEditor 的 tabBtnStyle 在 inline style 里硬编码颜色,绕过 CSS 变量。3) 详情页内 inline style 用 #bbb/#999 等灰色,在 dark 主题下与深色背景对比度差;ScheduleList 整个 modal 全 inline 写死颜色。
bugs.fix: 1) 新建 src/client/hooks/useThemeMode.ts (useSyncExternalStore + MutationObserver 监听 data-theme 属性变化,SSR 安全)。2) 新建 src/client/components/ThemedCodeMirror.tsx 包装 @uiw/react-codemirror,dark 时注入 @codemirror/theme-one-dark。3) 5 个直接使用 CodeMirror 的文件(ApiExecutionTimeline/PrePostActionItem/MockDetail/ExecutionResultPanel/MobileTestDetail)批量把 import CodeMirror 替换为 import ThemedCodeMirror + JSX 标签替换(Python 脚本)。4) CaseContentEditor 和 CodeMirrorHover 重构为内部用 ThemedCodeMirror,移除手动的 oneDark + useThemeMode 引用。5) CaseContentEditor tabBtnStyle 改用 var(--accent)/var(--border)/var(--surface)/var(--fg)。6) ApiDetail/MobileTestDetail/ScheduleList 的 inline #bbb/#999/#666/#fff/#f5f5f5/#fafafa/#e8e8e8/#333/#1677ff/#ff4d4f/#10b981 全部替换为对应 var(--*) Python 批量替换 18 处。

bugs.error_message: CodeMirror content area stays white in dark theme — only the line-number gutter follows theme; the editor body remains white with dark text on top of it
bugs.root_cause: @uiw/react-codemirror defaults theme prop to "light", which forces a white background that wins over the oneDark extension passed via extensions=[]. The extension only patches syntax/gutter styles, not the base editor background.
bugs.fix: Pass theme={theme} prop directly to CodeMirror (theme="dark" | "light"). Removed the manual oneDark import + useMemo merge. Now dark mode triggers @uiw/react-codemirror built-in dark theme which sets background AND text colors together.

bugs.root_cause: width: 100% → 140px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle) → 1px solid var(--border)
bugs.fix: Changed width: 100% → 140px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle) → 1px solid var(--border)
Changed border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle) → 1px solid var(--border)

bugs.error_message: Param table stretches short-name columns to full width (causing X button overflow) and squeezes column names invisible when many; dark theme table borders invisible; project scrollbar uses OS default (jarring in dark theme)
bugs.root_cause: Three issues together: (1) .param-table width:100% + width:100% on inputs caused columns to auto-stretch; (2) --border #27272a on --surface #18181b in dark theme has <2% luminance diff — invisible; (3) no global scrollbar styling, OS default clashed with theme
bugs.fix: 1) .param-table width:auto + max-width:100% + outer border + cell right/bottom borders; .param-header-input/.param-cell-input width:140px min-width:140px (fixed per-column instead of stretch). 2) Bumped dark --border from #27272a to #3f3f46 (luminance ~25% vs 9%) and --border-subtle from #1e1e22 to #2a2a30. 3) Added ::-webkit-scrollbar + scrollbar-width:thin to App.css using var(--border)/transparent so scrollbar tracks theme. 4) .alist-table-wrap now has outer border + radius, cells get right borders.

bugs.error_message: Detail pages (api/scenario/scenario-set/case-set/web/pc/mock) had a visible 1px frame around the outer .api-detail-card/.scenario-detail-card/.sset-card that made them look different from list pages (.alist which has no border)
bugs.root_cause: After bumping dark --border from #27272a to #3f3f46 (bug-189), the existing outer card border (1px top/left/right, border-bottom:none) became very visible. The asymmetric frame (no bottom) made the detail page look different from list pages which fill content area without any border.
bugs.fix: Removed border: 1px solid var(--border) AND border-bottom: none from 7 outer detail card containers. Also removed margin-bottom: 1.25rem on .sset-card (would leave a gap at the bottom). Now detail pages match list pages — flat surface filling content area, no frame.

bugs.error_message: Web/PcCaseDetail: clicking execution records has no effect — execRecords built from /logs endpoint which lacks report_url
bugs.root_cause: execRecords were built from /logs endpoint (web_case_logs/pc_case_logs tables) which has no report_url column. The /executions endpoint (web_case_executions/pc_case_executions tables) has report_url but was only used for latestReportUrl with limit=1.
bugs.fix: Changed both pages to build execRecords from /executions?limit=20 instead of /logs. This gives each record a reportUrl field, enabling click-to-view in LogTab.

bugs.root_cause: res.sendFile() sets Content-Length from fs.stat() at request time. If the report file is still being written by the executor, the actual bytes sent are less than Content-Length, causing the browser to abort.
bugs.fix: Replaced res.sendFile() with fs.createReadStream().pipe(res) using chunked Transfer-Encoding. No Content-Length header means the browser reads until the stream ends, avoiding the mismatch.
